---
title: "FigS6 H3 fusion"
author: "Jie Hua"
date: 2026-04-07
lang: en
date-modified: 2026-04-07
keywords: ["H3","Chromosome fusion"]
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    section-divs: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-copy: hover
    number-sections: true
    highlight-style: tango
editor: visual
---

# Load required packages

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(data.table)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(grid)
```

# Load *.paf* file generated from minimap2

Define the paf file

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

# Define the paf file
#paf_file <- "F:\\Big Paper\\Processed data\\Fig2_H3 Fusion\\H3_splited_reads_split.paf"

#lab PC
paf_file <- "H:\\HybridCells_Data\\FigS6_H3 Fusion\\H3_splited_reads_split.paf"


```

Read the paf file

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

# Read the file
paf <- fread(paf_file,sep = "\t",header = FALSE,fill = TRUE)
# Name the columns
setnames(paf, c(
  "query_name",        # 1
  "query_length",      # 2
  "query_start",       # 3
  "query_end",         # 4
  "strand",            # 5
  "target_name",       # 6
  "target_length",     # 7
  "target_start",      # 8
  "target_end",        # 9
  "n_match",           # 10
  "aln_block_length",  # 11
  "mapq",              # 12
  "tp",                # 13
  "cm",                # 14
  "s1",                # 15
  "s2",                # 16
  "dv",                # 17
  "rl"                 # 18
))
```

Convert to int

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

int_cols <- c(
  "query_length", "query_start", "query_end",
  "target_length", "target_start", "target_end",
  "n_match", "aln_block_length", "mapq"
)

for (cc in int_cols) {
  paf[, (cc) := as.integer(get(cc))]
}
```

Split the query name

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

tmp <- tstrsplit(paf$query_name, "\\|", fixed = FALSE)

# 为了稳妥，先检查是否至少拆出5段
if (length(tmp) < 5) {
  stop("query_name 按 | 拆分后不足5段，请检查输入格式。")
}

paf[, read_id := tmp[[1]]]
paf[, part := sub("^part=", "", tmp[[2]])]
paf[, match_type := sub("^match_type=", "", tmp[[3]])]
paf[, match := sub("^match=", "", tmp[[4]])]
paf[, segment := sub("^segment=", "", tmp[[5]])]

# 再拆 match 坐标
paf[, c("match_start", "match_end") := tstrsplit(match, "-", fixed = TRUE)]
paf[, match_start := as.integer(match_start)]
paf[, match_end := as.integer(match_end)]

# 再拆 segment 坐标
paf[, c("segment_start", "segment_end") := tstrsplit(segment, "-", fixed = TRUE)]
paf[, segment_start := as.integer(segment_start)]
paf[, segment_end := as.integer(segment_end)]

```

Extract tag columns

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

extract_tag_value <- function(x, tag_prefix, type_prefix) {
  sub(
    paste0("^", tag_prefix, ":", type_prefix, ":"),
    "",
    x
  )
}

paf[, tp := extract_tag_value(tp, "tp", "A")]
paf[, cm := as.integer(extract_tag_value(cm, "cm", "i"))]
paf[, s1 := as.integer(extract_tag_value(s1, "s1", "i"))]
paf[, s2 := as.integer(extract_tag_value(s2, "s2", "i"))]
paf[, dv := as.numeric(extract_tag_value(dv, "dv", "f"))]
paf[, rl := as.integer(extract_tag_value(rl, "rl", "i"))]

```

# Covert the number

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false


# 确保 paf 是 data.table
setDT(paf)

# =========================
# 1. 还原到原始 read 坐标
# =========================
paf[, orig_read_start := segment_start + query_start]
paf[, orig_read_end   := segment_start + query_end - 1]

# =========================
# 2. 参考基因组坐标转成 1-based
# =========================
paf[, ref_start := target_start + 1]
paf[, ref_end   := target_end]

# =========================
# 3. 生成一个干净表
# =========================
orig_map <- paf[, .(
  read_id,
  part,
  match_type,
  match_start,
  match_end,
  segment_start,
  segment_end,
  
  # 片段内部比对坐标（PAF query）
  query_length,
  query_start,
  query_end,
  
  # 还原后的原始 read 坐标
  orig_read_start,
  orig_read_end,
  
  # 比对方向和参考基因组位置
  strand,
  target_name,
  target_length,
  target_start,
  target_end,
  ref_start,
  ref_end,
  
  # alignment 质量信息
  n_match,
  aln_block_length,
  mapq,
  tp,
  cm,
  s1,
  s2,
  dv,
  rl
)]

```

# Plot1: Dot plot

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

setDT(orig_map)

reads_to_plot <- unique(orig_map$read_id)
dt <- copy(orig_map[read_id %in% reads_to_plot])

target_windows <- data.table(
  target_name = c("chr3R_mel", "chr3R_sim"),
  ymin = c(6070000, 2090000),
  ymax = c(6090000, 2100000)
)

dt <- merge(dt, target_windows, by = "target_name", all.x = TRUE)
dt <- dt[ref_end >= ymin & ref_start <= ymax]

dt[, read_id := factor(read_id, levels = unique(read_id))]
dt[, target_name := factor(target_name, levels = c("chr3R_mel", "chr3R_sim"))]

dt[, `:=`(
  x1 = ifelse(strand == "+", ref_start, ref_end),
  x2 = ifelse(strand == "+", ref_end, ref_start),
  y1 = orig_read_start,
  y2 = orig_read_end
)]

# ---- 每个panel只保留两个刻度 ----
breaks_min_max <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(numeric(0))
  rx <- range(x)
  if (rx[1] == rx[2]) return(rx[1])
  c(rx[1], rx[2])
}

breaks_zero_max <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(numeric(0))
  xmax <- max(x)
  if (xmax == 0) return(0)
  c(0, xmax)
}

# ---- bp 转 kb 标签 ----
kb_labels <- function(x) {
  format(round(x / 1000, 1), trim = TRUE, scientific = FALSE)
}

p <- ggplot(dt) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(
      x = x1, y = y1,
      xend = x2, yend = y2,
      color = match_type
    ),
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    read_id ~ target_name,
    scales = "free",
    switch = "both"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(forward = "#1f78b4", reverse = "#d95f02"),
    name = "Alignment\nDirection"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = function(x) range(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    labels = kb_labels
  )+
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = c(0, 0),
    limits = function(x) c(0, max(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    breaks = breaks_zero_max,
    labels = kb_labels
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Reference coordinate (kb)",
    y = "Read coordinate (kb)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 6) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "sans", color = "black"),

    # ===== 背景透明 =====
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),

    # ===== 去网格 =====
    panel.grid = element_blank(),

    # ===== panel / border =====
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.6, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.4, "lines"),

    # ===== strip =====
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.clip = "off",
    strip.text.x = element_text(
      size = 6,
      color = "black",
      angle = 0,
      hjust = 0.5,
      margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 2, l = 0)
    ),
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(
      size = 6,
      color = "black",
      angle = 0,
      hjust = 0.5,
      vjust = 0.5,
      margin = margin(t = 0, r = 2, b = 0, l = 0)
    ),

    # ===== 坐标轴 =====
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      size = 5,
      color = "black",
      angle = -45,
      hjust = 0,
      vjust = 1
    ),
    axis.text.y = element_text(
      size = 5,
      color = "black"
    ),
    axis.title.x = element_text(
      size = 7,
      color = "black"
    ),
    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 7,
      color = "black"
    ),
    axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(1.5, "pt"),

    # ===== 图例 =====
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.justification = c("right", "top"),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0),
    legend.box.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 6, color = "black"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6, color = "black"),
    legend.key.width = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.key.height = unit(6, "pt"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(2, "pt"),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "pt"),

    # ===== 外边距 =====
    plot.margin = margin(t = 3, r = 3, b = 0, l = 0)
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(
      keywidth = unit(6, "pt"),
      keyheight = unit(6, "pt")
    )
  )
```

Save the plot

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

p_canvas <- p+ggview::canvas(120,80,units="mm",dpi=600,bg="transparent")
p_canvas
#ggsave("H3_fusion.pdf",p,width=120,height=80,units="mm",dpi=900,bg="transparent")
```

# Plot2: Diagram

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(grid)

# =========================================================
# 0. Settings
# =========================================================
top_name <- "chr3R_mel"
bottom_name <- "chr3R_sim"

col_top <- "#ed556a"
col_bottom <- "#61649F"

# 参考窗口大小：top 画 breakpoint 左边 flank_bp bp；bottom 画 breakpoint 右边 flank_bp bp
flank_bp <- 3000

# 参考条长度（图坐标）
ref_left_xmin <- -1.00
ref_left_xmax <-  0.00
ref_right_xmin <- 0.00
ref_right_xmax <- 1.00

# 中间 read 的最大显示半宽
max_half_width <- 0.88
min_half_width <- 0.06

# 纵向布局
y_top <- 1.00
y_bottom <- 0.00
y_read_top <- 0.84
y_read_bottom <- 0.16

# 标签距离
read_label_gap <- 0.08
ref_label_gap  <- 0.12
ellipsis_gap   <- 0.04

# 箭头长度
arrow_len <- unit(2.6, "pt")


# =========================================================
# 1. Start from dt
# =========================================================
dt_tbl <- as_tibble(dt) %>%
  filter(target_name %in% c(top_name, bottom_name)) %>%
  mutate(
    ref_lo = pmin(ref_start, ref_end, na.rm = TRUE),
    ref_hi = pmax(ref_start, ref_end, na.rm = TRUE),
    qry_lo = pmin(orig_read_start, orig_read_end, na.rm = TRUE),
    qry_hi = pmax(orig_read_start, orig_read_end, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

# 每个 read 在每个 target 上汇总成一个总命中区段
hit_sum <- dt_tbl %>%
  group_by(read_id, target_name) %>%
  summarise(
    ref_start = min(ref_lo, na.rm = TRUE),
    ref_end   = max(ref_hi, na.rm = TRUE),
    ref_mid   = (ref_start + ref_end) / 2,

    qry_start = min(qry_lo, na.rm = TRUE),
    qry_end   = max(qry_hi, na.rm = TRUE),
    qry_mid   = (qry_start + qry_end) / 2,

    match_len = max(qry_hi, na.rm = TRUE) - min(qry_lo, na.rm = TRUE) + 1,
    read_len  = max(query_length, na.rm = TRUE),

    strand_major = if_else(
      sum(strand == "-", na.rm = TRUE) > sum(strand == "+", na.rm = TRUE),
      "-",
      "+"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 只保留同时命中两个 target 的 reads
reads_keep <- hit_sum %>%
  count(read_id, name = "n_targets") %>%
  filter(n_targets == 2) %>%
  pull(read_id)

hit_sum2 <- hit_sum %>%
  filter(read_id %in% reads_keep)

top_hits <- hit_sum2 %>%
  filter(target_name == top_name) %>%
  transmute(
    read_id,
    top_ref_start = ref_start,
    top_ref_end   = ref_end,
    top_ref_mid   = ref_mid,
    top_match_len = match_len,
    top_strand    = strand_major
  )

bottom_hits <- hit_sum2 %>%
  filter(target_name == bottom_name) %>%
  transmute(
    read_id,
    bottom_ref_start = ref_start,
    bottom_ref_end   = ref_end,
    bottom_ref_mid   = ref_mid,
    bottom_match_len = match_len,
    bottom_strand    = strand_major
  )

bridge_df <- inner_join(top_hits, bottom_hits, by = "read_id")

if (nrow(bridge_df) == 0) {
  stop("No reads bridge the two selected targets.")
}

# =========================================================
# 2. Define global breakpoint
# =========================================================
# 你的要求是：
# chr3R_mel 只画断点左边 -> 用 top_ref_end 作为 breakpoint
# chr3R_sim 只画断点右边 -> 用 bottom_ref_start 作为 breakpoint
bp_top_global <- median(bridge_df$top_ref_end, na.rm = TRUE)
bp_bottom_global <- median(bridge_df$bottom_ref_start, na.rm = TRUE)

top_window_start <- bp_top_global - flank_bp
top_window_end   <- bp_top_global

bottom_window_start <- bp_bottom_global
bottom_window_end   <- bp_bottom_global + flank_bp

fmt_bp <- function(x) scales::label_number(big.mark = ",", accuracy = 1)(x)

# =========================================================
# 3. Scale read lengths into plot widths
# =========================================================
# 左边蓝色长度按 chr3R_mel 匹配长度
# 右边黄色长度按 chr3R_sim 匹配长度
max_match <- max(c(bridge_df$top_match_len, bridge_df$bottom_match_len), na.rm = TRUE)
if (is.na(max_match) || max_match <= 0) max_match <- 1

bridge_df <- bridge_df %>%
  mutate(
    left_w = scales::rescale(top_match_len, to = c(min_half_width, max_half_width), from = c(1, max_match)),
    right_w = scales::rescale(bottom_match_len, to = c(min_half_width, max_half_width), from = c(1, max_match))
  )

# 排序：按 top 命中位置排，让图更整齐
bridge_df <- bridge_df %>%
  arrange(top_ref_mid, bottom_ref_mid) %>%
  mutate(read_order = row_number())

n_reads <- nrow(bridge_df)
if (n_reads == 1) {
  bridge_df$y_read <- mean(c(y_read_top, y_read_bottom))
} else {
  bridge_df$y_read <- seq(y_read_top, y_read_bottom, length.out = n_reads)
}

# =========================================================
# 4. Build plot tables
# =========================================================
# ---- reference segments ----
ref_df <- tibble(
  seg = c("top", "bottom"),
  x = c(ref_left_xmin, ref_right_xmin),
  xend = c(ref_left_xmax, ref_right_xmax),
  y = c(y_top, y_bottom),
  yend = c(y_top, y_bottom),
  color = c(col_top, col_bottom)
)

# ---- read segments ----
# 左边蓝色段：[-left_w, 0]
# 右边黄色段：[0, right_w]
read_left_df <- bridge_df %>%
  transmute(
    read_id,
    y = y_read,
    yend = y_read,
    xmin = -left_w,
    xmax = 0,
    forward = top_strand == "+",
    color = col_top
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    x = if_else(forward, xmin, xmax),
    xend = if_else(forward, xmax, xmin)
  )

read_right_df <- bridge_df %>%
  transmute(
    read_id,
    y = y_read,
    yend = y_read,
    xmin = 0,
    xmax = right_w,
    forward = bottom_strand == "+",
    color = col_bottom
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    x = if_else(forward, xmin, xmax),
    xend = if_else(forward, xmax, xmin)
  )

# ---- labels ----
read_label_df <- bridge_df %>%
  transmute(
    read_id,
    x = -(left_w + read_label_gap),
    y = y_read,
    label = paste0(
      read_id,
      ifelse(
        top_strand == "+",
        " →",
        " ←"
      )
    )
  )

ref_label_df <- tibble(
  x = c(ref_left_xmin - ref_label_gap, ref_right_xmax + ref_label_gap),
  y = c(y_top, y_bottom),
  label = c(top_name, bottom_name),
  hjust = c(1, 0)
)

coord_label_df <- tibble(
  x = c(ref_left_xmin, ref_left_xmax, ref_right_xmin, ref_right_xmax),
  y = c(y_top, y_top, y_bottom, y_bottom),
  label = c(
    fmt_bp(top_window_start),
    fmt_bp(top_window_end),
    fmt_bp(bottom_window_start),
    fmt_bp(bottom_window_end)
  ),
  hjust = c(0, 1, 0, 1),
  vjust = c(-1.2, -1.2, 2.2, 2.2)
)

ellipsis_df <- tibble(
  x = c(ref_left_xmin - ellipsis_gap, ref_right_xmax + ellipsis_gap),
  y = c(y_top, y_bottom),
  label = c("···", "···"),
  hjust = c(1, 0)
)

break_df <- tibble(
  x = 0,
  xend = 0,
  y = y_bottom - 0.04,
  yend = y_top + 0.04
)

# =========================================================
# 5. Plot
# =========================================================
# ============================================================
# Theme for breakpoint plot
# ============================================================

theme_breakpoint <- function(my_family = "sans") {
  theme_bw(base_family = my_family) +
    theme(
      # Transparent backgrounds
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),

      # Grid
      panel.grid = element_blank(),

      # Border
      panel.border = element_blank(),

      # Avoid double-thick borders
      axis.line = element_blank(),

      # Remove axes
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),

      # Text style
      text = element_text(
        family = my_family,
        color = "black"
      ),

      # Plot margin
      plot.margin = margin(t = 8, r = 36, b = 8, l = 36)
    )
}


# ============================================================
# Breakpoint plot
# ============================================================

p_break <- ggplot() +

  # breakpoint center line
  geom_segment(
    data = break_df,
    aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend),
    linewidth = 0.25,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey50",
    lineend = "butt"
  ) +

  # reference segments
  geom_segment(
    data = ref_df,
    aes(
      x = x,
      xend = xend,
      y = y,
      yend = yend,
      color = color
    ),
    linewidth = 3.0,
    lineend = "butt"
  ) +

  # read left segments
  geom_segment(
    data = read_left_df,
    aes(
      x = x,
      xend = xend,
      y = y,
      yend = yend,
      color = color
    ),
    linewidth = 2.3,
    lineend = "butt"
  ) +

  # read right segments
  geom_segment(
    data = read_right_df,
    aes(
      x = x,
      xend = xend,
      y = y,
      yend = yend,
      color = color
    ),
    linewidth = 2.3,
    lineend = "butt"
  ) +

  # read ids
  geom_text(
    data = read_label_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    hjust = 1,
    vjust = 0.5,
    size = 2.1,
    family = "sans",
    color = "black"
  ) +

  # reference names
  geom_text(
    data = ref_label_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, hjust = hjust),
    vjust = 0.5,
    size = 2.6,
    family = "sans",
    color = "black"
  ) +

  # interval start/end labels
  geom_text(
    data = coord_label_df,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      label = label,
      hjust = hjust,
      vjust = vjust
    ),
    size = 2.1,
    family = "sans",
    color = "black"
  ) +

  # ellipsis
  geom_text(
    data = ellipsis_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, hjust = hjust),
    vjust = 0.5,
    size = 3.1,
    family = "sans",
    color = "black"
  ) +

  scale_color_identity() +

  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(-1.55, 1.28),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-0.10, 1.10),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +

  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +

  theme_breakpoint(my_family = "sans")

p_break
```

Save the plot

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false



p_bridge_canvas <- p_break + ggview::canvas(180,80,units="mm",dpi=900,bg="transparent")
p_bridge_canvas

#ggview::save_ggplot(p_break, "diagram.pdf",width=180, height=80,units="mm",dpi=900,bg="transparent")

#ggsave("diagram.pdf",p_break,width = 180,height = 80,units = "mm",dpi = 600,bg = "transparent")
```
